name: YOLOv8s Architecture Deep Dive
description:
The Architecture of YOLOv8s

YOLOv8 (You Only Look Once version 8) by Ultralytics represents the state-of-the-art in real-time object detection. The 's' variant (Small) balances speed and accuracy for edge deployment.

  • Backbone: A modified CSPDarknet53 that uses C2f modules (Cross-Stage Partial Bottleneck with two convolutions) to enhance gradient flow and reduce model size.
  • SPPF: The Spatial Pyramid Pooling - Fast layer at the end of the backbone pools features at different scales into a fixed-size map.
  • Neck: Uses a PAN-FPN (Path Aggregation Network) approach, facilitating both top-down and bottom-up feature fusion to combine high-level semantic info with low-level geometric info.
  • Head: An Anchor-Free Decoupled Head. Unlike previous versions, it separates classification and regression (bounding box) tasks into two distinct branches, improving convergence.
code:
graph TD
  subgraph Input_Stage
    IMG[Input Image 640x640x3] 
  end

  subgraph Backbone
    B1[Conv P1/2] --> B2[Conv P2/4]
    B2 --> C2f1[C2f Module]
    C2f1 --> B3[Conv P3/8]
    B3 --> C2f2[C2f Module - P3 Output]
    C2f2 --> B4[Conv P4/16]
    B4 --> C2f3[C2f Module - P4 Output]
    C2f3 --> B5[Conv P5/32]
    B5 --> C2f4[C2f Module]
    C2f4 --> SPPF[SPPF - Spatial Pyramid Pooling]
  end

  subgraph Neck_PAN_FPN
    SPPF --> Up1[Upsample]
    Up1 --- Concat1{Concat}
    C2f3 --- Concat1
    Concat1 --> C2f_N1[C2f Module]
    
    C2f_N1 --> Up2[Upsample]
    Up2 --- Concat2{Concat}
    C2f2 --- Concat2
    Concat2 --> C2f_N2[C2f Module - P3 Scale]
    
    C2f_N2 --> Down1[Conv Downsample]
    Down1 --- Concat3{Concat}
    C2f_N1 --- Concat3
    Concat3 --> C2f_N3[C2f Module - P4 Scale]
    
    C2f_N3 --> Down2[Conv Downsample]
    Down2 --- Concat4{Concat}
    SPPF --- Concat4
    Concat4 --> C2f_N4[C2f Module - P5 Scale]
  end

  subgraph Decoupled_Head
    C2f_N2 --> Head1[Decoupled Head: Small Objects]
    C2f_N3 --> Head2[Decoupled Head: Medium Objects]
    C2f_N4 --> Head3[Decoupled Head: Large Objects]
    
    Head1 --> Out[Class + Box Prediction]
    Head2 --> Out
    Head3 --> Out
  end

  IMG --> B1

  %% Styling
  classDef default fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#333,stroke-width:1px,color:#000;
  classDef highlight fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#01579b,stroke-width:2px,color:#000;
  classDef stage fill:#fff,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5,color:#000;

  style Input_Stage fill:transparent,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style Backbone fill:transparent,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style Neck_PAN_FPN fill:transparent,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style Decoupled_Head fill:transparent,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-dasharray: 5 5

  class C2f1,C2f2,C2f3,C2f4,C2f_N1,C2f_N2,C2f_N3,C2f_N4 highlight
  class SPPF,Head1,Head2,Head3 highlight
